pkgmetadata.longdescription: PLINK 2.0 is a whole genome association analysis toolset for large-scale genomic data. This package provides the official prebuilt binary from the alpha7 release series. Includes plink2 (main tool) and vcf_subset. The binary contains statically linked Intel math routines under Intel ISSL.

use.flag: Use AVX2-optimized binary (requires Haswell/Zen 2 or newer CPU)
